# Canonical labels (maintained by Jesse)

## Type
- `type:bug` ‚Äî defect.
- `type:feat` ‚Äî new capability.
- `type:chore` ‚Äî maintenance / housekeeping.
- `type:docs` ‚Äî documentation only.
- `type:research` ‚Äî research request for Robert.
- `type:handoff` ‚Äî formal cross-agent handoff.

## Area
- `area:agents` ‚Äî agent definition files.
- `area:runtime` ‚Äî Node server, dashboard, CLI.
- `area:adapters` ‚Äî Copilot, Claude, Gemini, OpenAI integrations.
- `area:ci` ‚Äî workflows.
- `area:docs` ‚Äî documentation.
- `area:tests` ‚Äî test files / QA.

## Priority
- `priority:p0` ‚Äî blocker.
- `priority:p1` ‚Äî high.
- `priority:p2` ‚Äî normal.
- `priority:p3` ‚Äî low.

## Status
- `triage` ‚Äî newly opened, awaiting routing.
- `blocked` ‚Äî has external blocker.
- `in-review` ‚Äî PR opened.
- `regression` ‚Äî Rook flagged.
